Clean technical architecture diagram showing an AI orchestrator agent in the center connected to four tool boxes arranged around it: web search API, calendar service, database, and email system. Labeled arrows between components show scoped token flow. Warm amber and cream color palette, flat professional illustration style, clean white background. No gradients, no photos, technical diagram aesthetic.

Vertical trust chain diagram showing four connected entities from top to bottom: Human User at top in an amber box, AI Orchestrator below it, Sub-Agent below that, and Protected API at the bottom. Downward arrows between each labeled with identity assertion types: delegated token, scoped token, verified assertion. An identity verification checkpoint symbol between Sub-Agent and API. Clean flat technical style, warm cream background.

Two-column comparison diagram. Left column labeled STDIO showing a terminal icon with a warning symbol and text indicating no auth specification. Right column labeled Streamable HTTP showing a network icon with a gate symbol indicating optional OAuth. Below both columns a highlighted box labeled Enterprise Auth Gaps listing: no agent identity, no tool-level access control, no centralized revocation. Warm amber and cream color palette, flat technical diagram style, clean white background.

Product architecture diagram showing four interconnected component boxes arranged in a square: Cross App Access at top-left, Fine Grained Authorization at top-right, Token Vault at bottom-left, MCP Server at bottom-right. An AI Agent icon above the four boxes with arrows flowing down, and Protected APIs below with arrows flowing up through the components. Amber and cream palette, flat professional technical illustration, clean white background.

Horizontal flow diagram showing five connected boxes from left to right: AI Agent, MCP Client, Auth Adapter highlighted with a bold amber border in the center, MCP Server, and Protected API. Below the Auth Adapter box three process labels connected by small arrows: Scoped Token, Access Decision, Audit Log. Warm cream background, flat minimal professional illustration style.

Network connection diagram showing an MCP Client box on the left and an MCP Server box on the right, connected by a horizontal line labeled persistent SSE connection. An auth checkpoint gate symbol on the connection line. Below the connection: three labeled process boxes showing Tool Discovery, Tool Execution, and Auth Token phases. Warm amber and cream color palette, flat professional technical diagram style, white background.

Sequence diagram showing four actors from left to right: User, AI Agent, Token Exchange Endpoint, and Protected API. Five numbered arrows showing the flow: 1-User authenticates, 2-Access token issued to agent, 3-Agent presents user token plus its own credential, 4-Delegated scoped token issued, 5-Agent calls API with delegated token. Warm amber and cream color palette, flat professional technical sequence diagram style, clean white background.

Horizontal chain diagram showing four boxes in a row: Human User, AI Orchestrator, Sub-Agent, and API Server. Small identity assertion labels above each connecting arrow. At the API Server box a stacked list showing the full delegation chain with three entries tracing back through each principal. An identity verification gate symbol between Sub-Agent and API Server. Warm amber and cream palette, clean flat professional technical style, white background.

Three-party architecture diagram showing a Requesting App on the left, an Identity Provider highlighted in amber in the center, and a Resource App on the right. Four numbered arrows: 1-Requesting App authenticates to IdP, 2-IdP issues identity assertion token, 3-Requesting App presents assertion to Resource App, 4-Resource App validates and issues scoped access token. Warm cream background, flat professional technical style.

Data flow diagram showing an AI Agent box at the top flowing through an Auth Layer box in the middle to a Protected API box below. From the Auth Layer an arrow points down to an Audit Log box showing sample fields: actor identity, user subject, event type, granted scopes, timestamp. From the Audit Log an arrow points right to a dashboard and monitoring system box. Warm amber and cream color palette, flat professional technical diagram style, white background.
